title: thymus bracteatus subsp. borgiae
intro: Thymus bracteatus subsp. borgiae is a subspecies of the Thymus bracteatus plant, commonly known as the Borgia thyme, which is a type of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Thymus bracteatus subsp. borgiae include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and support immune function. Thymus bracteatus subsp. borgiae can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
